title: hyptis pulegioides
intro: Hyptis pulegioides, also known as False Hyptis, is a perennial herb belonging to the Lamiaceae family, native to the Americas. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Hyptis pulegioides include its potential to treat wounds, infections, and respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant properties. Hyptis pulegioides can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or essential oil, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
